!    total energy              =   -6614.60472205 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          6.5E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.26522901 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -137702.69643570 Ry
